synthesis_report:
Balanced synthesis: It marks the first time that Craig and Lindsay Foreman have released a public statement via their family since the start of the conflict on 28 February.

Today, Iran has rejected the US peace plan as “excessive”. The US plan, which has not been made public, reportedly includes Iran dism In terms of doctrine, NATO countries also need to be thinking about where the big adversaries, Russia and China, are going with respect to autonomous systems.
